headlines.headline: Joval Brands files routine patent applications in wireless connectivity

sentiment.reasoning: Routine patent applications are a normal part of R&D and do not indicate an immediate or significant financial impact.

sentiment.reasoning: Rising costs in a key operational area like automated logistics directly indicate margin pressure, which will negatively impact profitability.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
